surface_verification.justification: Diff touches only operational PowerShell scripts (start-server-production.ps1, install-windows.ps1) plus their cross-platform node:test structural specs. Zero files under server/src or client/src, so the app vitest/E2E suites exercise no changed code. Authoritative coverage = scripts/*.test.* (44/44 green) PLUS an empirical production-build proof: in the real deploy target (main-tree client) npm install resolved @dnd-kit/{core,utilities,accessibility} and `npm run build` then succeeded ('built in 14.03s'), reproducing-then-fixing the reported 'cannot find module' failure.

degraded.detail: F0 full app suite (server+client vitest) skipped: scripts-only change with no app-code surface; ran the related structural suite scripts/*.test.* (44/44) + real build verify instead.

behaviors.behavior: start-server-production.ps1 runs `npm install` for BOTH server and client before building
behaviors.evidence: scripts/start-server-production.test.mjs: 'npm install runs for BOTH server and client'

behaviors.behavior: start-server-production.ps1: the first npm install precedes the first npm run build
behaviors.evidence: scripts/start-server-production.test.mjs: 'the FIRST npm install precedes the FIRST build'

behaviors.behavior: start-server-production.ps1: every npm install runs before the server-kill (failed install leaves the running server untouched)
behaviors.evidence: scripts/start-server-production.test.mjs: 'every npm install runs BEFORE the server-kill'

behaviors.behavior: The patched install->build sequence resolves the newly-added dependency and the client compiles
behaviors.evidence: Empirical: main-tree client `npm install` (added @dnd-kit/*) then `npm run build` -> 'built in 14.03s', no 'cannot find module'

behaviors.behavior: install-windows.ps1 installs deps + builds both server and client (4 npm steps)
behaviors.evidence: scripts/install-windows.test.mjs: 'installs deps for BOTH server and client + builds BOTH'

behaviors.behavior: install-windows.ps1 does not suppress npm stderr to $null
behaviors.evidence: scripts/install-windows.test.mjs: 'npm steps do NOT suppress stderr to $null'

behaviors.behavior: install-windows.ps1 gates each npm step on its exit code (abort before creating the startup shortcut)
behaviors.evidence: scripts/install-windows.test.mjs: 'each npm step is gated on its exit code'

behaviors.behavior: Actual PowerShell runtime abort-on-failure flow (Read-Host prompt + exit 1 + hidden Start-Process)
